TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al_Bianchi, title = Al_Bianchi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Bianchi} }

S.FORM: == Al Bianchi == Al Bianchi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. Alkawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Al Bianchi, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Bianchi mqwas biru sa Long Island City pqwsan biru seneng, New York, U.S. Al Bianchi, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1954, mqwas biru sa Bowling Green pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Bianchi hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1956, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Al Bianchi

== Al Bianchi == Al Bianchi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. Alkawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Al Bianchi, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Bianchi mqwas biru sa Long Island City pqwsan biru seneng, New York, U.S. Al Bianchi, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1954, mqwas biru sa Bowling Green pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Bianchi hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1956, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Al Bianchi
S.PHON: == al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi == al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. alkawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pinqő≤aqan nja al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa loŇč is~…ēlan* ¶~ ®itj pqws~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč, new jork, u.s~…ē. al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa ő≤owliŇč …£reen pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. mintzjuwaw nja al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi ńßija …£a s~…ēenmoŇč p…£naw Ē mari Ē nő≤a. t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē al ő≤ian ¶~ ®ńßi
